hero.description: A software developer who loves problem-solving, is always open to learning, and enjoys discovering new technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: A Passionate Full Stack Developer
about.p1: I enjoy taking an active role in every stage of the software development process. I work across a wide range of areas, from Frontend to Backend, database management to system architecture.
about.p2: I love transforming complex problems into simple and effective solutions. Using my analytical thinking and logical reasoning skills, I strive to find the optimum solution in every project.
about.p3: To keep up with the rapid changes in the technology world, I constantly improve myself and learn new tools and methodologies.
about.experienceSubtitle: Experience gained throughout my professional career

problemSolver.title: Problem Solver
problemSolver.description: I enjoy finding solutions to complex problems. Every challenge presents a new learning opportunity.

learner.title: Continuous Learner
learner.description: Technology is constantly evolving, and I love evolving with it. Learning new things is a passion for me.

fullstack.title: Full-Stack Developer
fullstack.description: I have experience in both frontend and backend areas. This allows me to bring a holistic approach to my projects.

techStack.title: Diverse Tech Stack
techStack.description: I have experience with various technologies such as React.js, Next.js, C#, ASP.NET Core, .NET Framework, Web API, NodeJS, T-SQL, Docker, ASP.NET MVC, and Flutter.

perspective.title: Versatile Perspective
perspective.description: I value approaching problems from different angles and developing creative, out-of-the-box solutions.

adaptable.title: Adaptable
adaptable.description: I work successfully in dynamic environments and adapt quickly to changing requirements. This flexibility allows me to effectively handle unexpected challenges.

gelecek2025.title: Gelecek Varlık Yönetimi
gelecek2025.desc: Responsible for the development and optimization of critical internal software systems. Managing the design, development, and secure deployment processes of external-facing web platforms. Designing database structures and providing backend solutions that support corporate workflows. Also playing an active role in the architecture and development of the company's first mobile application.

gelecek2022.title: Gelecek Varlık Yönetimi
gelecek2022.desc: Responsible for the development and maintenance of applications used within the company. Developing projects using various technologies. Writing database queries when necessary during development.

patika.title: Gelecek Varlık Yönetimi - Patika
patika.desc: Completed training provided on the Patika.dev platform, learning the fundamentals of software development. Subsequently passed interviews and started working as a Junior Full Stack Developer at Gelecek Varlık Yönetimi.

YumaIdentity.title: YumaIdentity - IAM Service
YumaIdentity.desc: A full-featured Identity and Access Management (IAM) service. Provides user authentication, authorization, role management, and secure token-based session management. A scalable identity management platform developed with modern full-stack architecture.

dalle.title: Dall-E Clone
dalle.desc: An AI image generation app inspired by OpenAI's DALL-E. Users can generate and share AI-created images based on text prompts using the MERN stack.

airbnb.title: Airbnb Clone
airbnb.desc: A clone of the Airbnb website. Users can search for properties, view details, and book stays.

twitter.title: Twitter Clone
twitter.desc: A modern clone of Twitter. Users can tweet, follow others, and interact. A full-featured social media app developed using Next.js and TypeScript.

aiPrompt.title: AI Prompt App
aiPrompt.desc: A platform where users can create and share AI prompts. Users can save their own prompts, discover others', and interact. Developed using Next.js and modern authentication methods.

pokemon.title: Mobile Pokemon App
pokemon.desc: A Flutter project developed using clean architecture principles with PokeAPI. Features include fetching and displaying Pokémon, viewing detailed info, searching by name, and responsive design for mobile and web. Organized with a feature-first architecture for modularity and maintainability.

habit.title: Habit Tracker App
habit.desc: A Flutter app that helps users track and maintain their habits with a clean, modern UI and powerful features.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technologies and tools I work with

footer.aboutDesc: I'm a detail-oriented Full Stack Developer developing innovative and sustainable solutions with modern technologies.

blog.title: Blog
blog.subtitle: Welcome to my blog! Here I share my thoughts, ideas, and new learnings about software development.
